label: Transparent plum blossom branch motif
prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous Plum Blossom transparent motif chroma-key source
Primary request: Create a complete plum blossom branch motif for a design-system catalog, isolated on a removable chroma-key background.
Subject: A winter garden plum blossom branch with pale pink and white flowers, deep bud-red buds, dark bark, small stamen details, and refined botanical texture. Crisp edges, no cast shadow.
Composition/framing: centered complete branch cutout with blossoms, buds, and bark visible without cropping.
Chroma-key background: perfectly flat solid #00ff00 background for removal, uniform color only, no shadow, gradient, texture, reflection, floor plane, watermark, or text.
Constraints: no cherry blossom confusion, no vase, no hand, no props, no landscape, no text.

label: Light-mode design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Plum Blossom light-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive light-mode shadcn/tweakcn design-system board named Morphous Plum Blossom, derived from the visible plum blossom branch cutout.
Canvas: wide 16:9 high-resolution board, polished elegant writing-system presentation.
Required visible sections: Morphous Plum Blossom, Plum Blossom Branch, Palette, Typography, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard/Data, Forms, Table, Command/Search, Status States, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens, Asset Examples.
Reference use: Extract petal-pink actions, blossom-white surfaces, bark-ink typography, bud-red emphasis, winter mist backgrounds, branch-line dividers, and subtle paper texture for writing, publishing, notes, and knowledge interfaces.
UI coverage: buttons, inputs, selects, textarea, checkboxes, radios, switches, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, document cards, tables, command palette, sidebar, metrics, charts, forms, empty/loading/error/success states, texture samples, spacing, radius, border, shadow, and token swatches.
Constraints: no cherry blossom confusion, no generic pink UI, no neon colors, no tiny unreadable text, no watermark, no misspelling of Morphous Plum Blossom.

label: Dark-mode design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Plum Blossom dark-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive dark-mode shadcn/tweakcn board for Morphous Plum Blossom that feels like the light board translated to dark mode.
Canvas: wide 16:9 high-resolution board, polished professional design-system presentation.
Required visible sections: Morphous Plum Blossom, Plum Blossom Branch, Dark Mode, Palette, Typography, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard/Data, Forms, Table, Command/Search, Status States, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens, Asset Examples.
Reference use: Preserve petal-pink actions, blossom foregrounds, bark-black surfaces, bud-red accents, winter mist contrast, and paper-like editorial spacing for writing and knowledge work.
Constraints: no neon palette, no generic black UI, no unrelated colors, no tiny text, no watermark, no misspelling of Morphous Plum Blossom.
